transcription.text: For you and your home, a Ken Tile floor does so many things. It lights up a room with beauty, is wonderfully easy to care for, and virtually never wears out its welcome. Here's a floor done in new Ken Tile Easy Clean solid vinyl tile. For only $33.95 and in less than a day, you can install Easy Clean yourself right over your old floor. Adhesive, a brush, and scissors are all you need. Ken Tile Easy Clean is the low-cost solid vinyl tile that's not just vinyl on top, but vinyl through and through. Yes, you can afford a greaseproof long-wearing vinyl tile floor if it's Ken Tile Easy Clean. To see all the beautiful Easy Clean solid vinyl colors, visit your favorite Ken Tile dealer or look in the yellow pages under floors. Easy Clean, another quality product from Ken Tile Floors.

metadata.title: Easy Clean Kentile Vinyl Asbestos Floor
